description_long: This apartment building is a rectangular, multi-story structure with a flat facade and a partially constructed wooden roof frame. The exterior walls are painted a light color, punctuated by regularly spaced blue-framed windows arranged in neat horizontal rows across all visible sides. The building sits on a gray concrete base, with a prominent entrance ramp and stairway leading up to the main door on one side. The roof is unfinished, exposing a grid of wooden trusses and beams, suggesting ongoing construction or renovation. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on symmetry and function.
description: A rectangular, multi-story apartment building with blue-framed windows, a gray base, and an exposed wooden roof frame, featuring a main entrance ramp and stairway.
description_view_0: The long side of the building is visible, showing rows of blue-framed windows and the exposed wooden roof trusses.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is shown, highlighting the depth of the structure and the full extent of the wooden roof frame.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, featuring the main entrance with a ramp and stairway, as well as the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, with the roof trusses extending outward and a small section of the base protruding.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in evenly spaced, horizontal rows with consistent alignment and symmetry on all visible sides.
